text: Salesforce OData timeouts on payloads over 2MB were resolved by enabling pagination (batch size 200) in the request-reply step and raising the HTTP adapter timeout to 120s. Root cause: large payload synchronous call.

401 invalid_client on OAuth2 token endpoint historically caused by expired client secret in the security material. Fix: rotate credentials in CPI Keystore/Security Material, redeploy iFlow, retry failed messages.
EDI DTM segment missing causes xsd:date cast failures. Fix: add ifWithoutElse + mapWithDefault in message mapping for optional date fields; coordinate with trading partner to send DTM qualifier 017.
Partner profile not found errors require WE20 partner profile creation for the logical system and reprocessing stuck tRFC entries in SM58. CPI side needs no change.

SFTP known_hosts mismatches after bank server migrations resolved by re-importing the new SSH host key into CPI Keystore known_hosts and redeploying. Certificate expiry requires renewal before deadline.
Recurring timeouts during month-end load resolved via async decoupling with JMS queue between sender and receiver, smoothing peak throughput.

Intentional test failure deliberately coded into script2.groovy at line 9 for demo purposes. com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occured: java.lang.RuntimeException: Intentional test failure for incident resolver@ line 9 in script2.groovy.
